title: Uchira Vaneswarar Temple
tagline: Uchira Vaneswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Tiruvilanagar Uchiravaneswarar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Tiruvila Nagar in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Tiruvilanagar Uchiravaneswarar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Tiruvila Nagar in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva. He is called as Uchira Vaneswarar. His consort is known as Veyuru Tholi Ammai.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Alanduraiappar Temple, Nallatthukkudi
topPlaces.description: Alanduraiappar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located at Nallathukudi village near Mayiladuthurai, in Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Veerateeswarar Temple, Thirupariyalur
topPlaces.description: Veerateswarar Temple (also called Dakshapureeswarat temple) is a Hindu temple located at Keelaparasalur (formerly known as Thirupariyalur) in the Sembanarkoil block of Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Tirupparialur.

topPlaces.name: Sembanarkoil
topPlaces.description: Sembanarkoil (formerly Semponnarkoil) is a panchayat town in Tharangambadi taluk in Mayiladuthurai district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The town is located in the historic Thanjavur area on the banks of the river Kaveri.

topPlaces.name: Mayiladuthurai new bus station
topPlaces.description: Mayiladuthurai New Bus Station, officially known as Kamarajar New Bus Station, is a bus terminus, serving the town of Mayiladuthurai, Tamil Nadu, India. The station is named after K. Kamarajar, a former chief minister of Tamil Nadu , who was popularly called Karmaveerar (Great leader).

topPlaces.name: Keezhaiyur
topPlaces.description: Keezhaiyur is a revenue village in the Karaikal taluk of Karaikal District. It is situated at a distance of about 6 kilometres south-east of Karaikal town and 2 kilometres east of Tirumalarajanpattinam commune.

topPlaces.name: Mayuranathaswami Temple, Mayiladuthurai
topPlaces.description: Mayuranathaswamy Temple, or simply Mayuranathar Temple, is a Hindu temple in the town of Mayiladuthurai (formerly known as Mayavaram or Mayuram) in Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Lord Mayuranathaswamy, a form of Shiva, and has given its name to the town itself.

topPlaces.name: Koorai silk sari
topPlaces.description: Koorai silk sari, also referred to as Koorai pattu pudavai, Koorai pattu, or Koranad cloth, is a traditional nine-yard sari originating from Koranad in Mayiladuthurai, Tamil Nadu, India. Traditionally worn by brides during Hindu wedding ceremonies, the sari is recognized for its unique weaving patterns and cultural significance.

topPlaces.name: Agarakkirangudi
topPlaces.description: Agarakkirangudi is a village in the Mayiladuthurai taluk of Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu, India.

items.note: Alanduraiappar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located at Nallathukudi village near Mayiladuthurai, in Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu, India.

Veerateswarar Temple (also called Dakshapureeswarat temple) is a Hindu temple located at Keelaparasalur (formerly known as Thirupariyalur) in the Sembanarkoil block of Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Tirupparialur.

Sembanarkoil (formerly Semponnarkoil) is a panchayat town in Tharangambadi taluk in Mayiladuthurai district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The town is located in the historic Thanjavur area on the banks of the river Kaveri.

itinerary.title: Day 2 — Mayiladuthurai new bus station & around

items.note: Mayiladuthurai New Bus Station, officially known as Kamarajar New Bus Station, is a bus terminus, serving the town of Mayiladuthurai, Tamil Nadu, India. The station is named after K. Kamarajar, a former chief minister of Tamil Nadu , who was popularly called Karmaveerar (Great leader).

Keezhaiyur is a revenue village in the Karaikal taluk of Karaikal District. It is situated at a distance of about 6 kilometres south-east of Karaikal town and 2 kilometres east of Tirumalarajanpattinam commune.

Mayuranathaswamy Temple, or simply Mayuranathar Temple, is a Hindu temple in the town of Mayiladuthurai (formerly known as Mayavaram or Mayuram) in Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Lord Mayuranathaswamy, a form of Shiva, and has given its name to the town itself.

Koorai silk sari, also referred to as Koorai pattu pudavai, Koorai pattu, or Koranad cloth, is a traditional nine-yard sari originating from Koranad in Mayiladuthurai, Tamil Nadu, India. Traditionally worn by brides during Hindu wedding ceremonies, the sari is recognized for its unique weaving patterns and cultural significance.
Agarakkirangudi is a village in the Mayiladuthurai taluk of Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Uchira Vaneswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Uchira Vaneswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Uchira Vaneswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (115 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (116 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Uchira Vaneswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Uchira Vaneswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Uchira Vaneswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Uchira Vaneswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Uchira Vaneswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Alanduraiappar Temple, Nallatthukkudi, Veerateeswarar Temple, Thirupariyalur, Sembanarkoil, Mayiladuthurai new bus station, Keezhaiyur.
